hero_body: Bringing the passion of rugby to the island of Curaçao. Everyone is welcome — from first-timers to seasoned players.
card_training_body: We train multiple times a week at Saliña Terrain. All skill levels welcome — come sweat with us!
card_events_body: From local tournaments to Caribbean Championships — follow our events and come cheer us on!
card_join_body: New to rugby? Never played before? No problem. Sign up and we'll take care of the rest.
about_teaser_body1: The Curaçao Rugby Federation is the governing body for rugby union in Curaçao, a constituent country of the Kingdom of the Netherlands in the southern Caribbean Sea.
about_teaser_body2: We are affiliated with Rugby Americas North (RAN) and World Rugby, and our national team — the Curaçao Sharks — compete in Caribbean and Americas regional competitions.
social_body: Stay up to date with match results, training highlights, and island life — follow us on social media.
footer_tagline: Promoting and developing rugby union on the beautiful island of Curaçao. Join us on and off the pitch!
about_page_subtitle: The Curaçao Sharks and the game we love
about_p1: The Curaçao Rugby Federation (CRF) — Federashon di Rugby di Kòrsou in Papiamentu — is the official governing body for rugby union in Curaçao, a constituent country of the Kingdom of the Netherlands situated in the southern Caribbean Sea, just 65 km north of the Venezuelan coastline.
about_p2: Rugby in Curaçao has grown from a small group of enthusiasts into a proper federation with multiple teams, including men's and women's XVs and Sevens squads. The CRF is affiliated with Rugby Americas North (RAN) and the global governing body World Rugby.
about_sharks_p1: Our national rugby union team carries the proud nickname the Sharks. They compete in Caribbean regional competitions including the RAN Championship and the Caribbean Rugby Association (CRA) tournaments, taking on nations such as Trinidad & Tobago, Barbados, Jamaica, and other Caribbean islands.
about_sharks_p2: The Sharks wear the blue, red, and yellow of Curaçao — colours that reflect the island's flag and its vibrant spirit. Competing on the regional stage, they represent not just a federation, but an entire island's passion for the game.
about_mission_1: Develop rugby at all levels — youth, senior, men's, women's, and Sevens
about_mission_2: Provide access to quality coaching and training facilities
about_mission_3: Represent Curaçao with pride in Caribbean and international competitions
about_mission_4: Foster a welcoming, inclusive rugby community on the island
about_mission_5: Grow the sport among Curaçao's youth through school programs
about_island_p1: Curaçao is renowned for its stunning beaches, colourful Willemstad architecture (a UNESCO World Heritage Site), and warm, year-round climate. Rugby here is played against a backdrop unlike anywhere else in the world — trade winds, Caribbean sunshine, and a community that approaches everything with the island's signature warmth.
about_island_p2: Whether you're a local, an expat, or a visitor who wants to lace up for a session, you are always welcome on the pitch with us.
training_page_subtitle: Join us on the pitch — everyone is welcome
training_bring_1: Sports clothes and boots (or trainers for beginners)
training_bring_2: A water bottle — it's hot on the island!
training_bring_note: No experience needed. We'll take care of the rest.
events_empty_body: Check back soon or follow us on social media for the latest updates.

news_empty_body: Check back soon or follow our social media channels above.

join_success_body: Thanks for reaching out. We'll contact you soon with more details about training.
join_form_subtitle: No experience needed. All ages and skill levels welcome.
join_message_placeholder: Any questions or things we should know?
